meta.name: Wave Fd — EC/UCL finalists (winners + runners-up) 1980-81 to 1989-90 (pickable)
meta.note: Complete. All 10 editions 1980-81 to 1989-90 have both finalists pickable, each web-verified per edition (final match sheets, BDFutbol / Wikipedia / UEFA / club sources). Every promoted club-season removed from the EC/UCL tier-O index in the same pass; global O/P de-dup re-run with zero overlap. Eastern European sides (Steaua, Benfica) carry conf C where squad depth beyond the final XI is less documented.
